# Velvet Letters

> Velvet Letters is a creative studio that designs and builds cinematic, immersive,
> custom websites for premium brands. We combine storytelling, UX, real-time 3D,
> motion design, SEO/GEO strategy, and conversion thinking to create digital
> impressions that make people stop, feel, remember, and act.

## What Velvet Letters builds
- 3D websites — real-time WebGL brand objects and scenes
- Immersive websites — spaces the visitor moves through
- Cinematic websites — art-directed lighting, lensing, pacing and motion
- Storytelling websites — scroll-driven narrative experiences
- SEO / GEO-optimized websites — built to be found by search and answer engines
- Conversion-focused websites — engineered to turn attention into action
- Custom brand worlds — bespoke design languages, never templates
- Luxury digital experiences — tactile, restrained, expensive-feeling

## Who it is for
Premium and high-consideration brands: founders, studios, hospitality, heritage,
product launches, and any brand that wants to be felt and remembered, not skimmed.

## Process
Discovery → Shared Vision → Agreement → Creation → Refinement → Launch → Magnetism.

## How to start
Email hello@velvetletters.com or use the contact form at /contact ("Send the first letter").

## Key pages
- / — Home (the brand trailer)
- /about — The studio, as a catalogue of digital impressions
- /process — How a cinematic site gets made
- /styles — The eight website styles we build
- /contact — Start a project
- /post-office — A hidden interactive experience
